features: Brings to life the playful fragrance of pink sweet Pea, evoking the hope and joy brought by a rejuvenating nature
Fragrance delicately diffused from natural rattan stems
Elegant design that looks fantastic in any room
scented liquid included in bottle lasts up to five weeks
description: Airwick reed Diffuser uses natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful fragrances. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home with its natural fragrance experience and elegant design. White roses & Pink sweet Pea bask in the playful scent of the hay meadows & gardens inspired by the yorkshire Dales in full bloom.
